svg.text: Optimization 3 — GROUP_M tile ordering for L2 reuse
Reorder program IDs so concurrently-running tiles share the same A rows / B columns in L2.
First 6 tiles span one B-column strip;
little overlap in working set → L2 thrash.
First 18 tiles form a 3×6 block → A rows AND B cols
re-hit from L2 across the block.
